# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response, Router } from "express";
import { createConnection, getRepository } from "typeorm";
import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  UpdateDateColumn,
} from "typeorm";

// Entity definition
@Entity("products")
export class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100 })
  category!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100 })
  brand!: string;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 3, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  rating!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  is_active!: boolean;

  @CreateDateColumn()
  created_at!: Date;

  @UpdateDateColumn()
  updated_at!: Date;
}

// Allowlists for non-parameterizable SQL fragments
const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS: Set<string> = new Set([
  "id",
  "name",
  "price",
  "category",
  "brand",
  "stock",
  "rating",
  "created_at",
  "updated_at",
]);

const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS: Set<string> = new Set(["ASC", "DESC"]);

const ALLOWED_PRICE_OPERATORS: Set<string> = new Set([
  ">=",
  "<=",
  ">",
  "<",
  "=",
]);

const ALLOWED_RATING_OPERATORS: Set<string> = new Set([
  ">=",
  "<=",
  ">",
  "<",
  "=",
]);

const ALLOWED_STOCK_OPERATORS: Set<string> = new Set([
  ">=",
  "<=",
  ">",
  "<",
  "=",
]);

// Validation helpers
function validateSortColumn(column: string): string | null {
  const normalized = column.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS.has(normalized)) {
    return normalized;
  }
  return null;
}

function validateSortDirection(direction: string): string | null {
  const normalized = direction.trim().toUpperCase();
  if (ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS.has(normalized)) {
    return normalized;
  }
  return null;
}

function validateOperator(
  operator: string,
  allowedSet: Set<string>
): string | null {
  const normalized = operator.trim();
  if (allowedSet.has(normalized)) {
    return normalized;
  }
  return null;
}

// Search endpoint handler
async function searchProducts(req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const {
      name,
      description,
      category,
      brand,
      min_price,
      max_price,
      price_operator,
      price_value,
      min_rating,
      max_rating,
      rating_operator,
      rating_value,
      stock_operator,
      stock_value,
      in_stock,
      is_active,
      categories, // comma-separated list
      brands, // comma-separated list
      sort_by,
      sort_direction,
      page,
      limit,
    } = req.query;

    const conditions: string[] = [];
    const parameters: any[] = [];
    let paramIndex = 1;

    // Text search: name (ILIKE for case-insensitive partial match)
    if (name && typeof name === "string" && name.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.name ILIKE $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(`%${name.trim()}%`);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Text search: description
    if (
      description &&
      typeof description === "string" &&
      description.trim().length > 0
    ) {
      conditions.push(`p.description ILIKE $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(`%${description.trim()}%`);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Exact match: category
    if (
      category &&
      typeof category === "string" &&
      category.trim().length > 0
    ) {
      conditions.push(`p.category = $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(category.trim());
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Exact match: brand
    if (brand && typeof brand === "string" && brand.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.brand = $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(brand.trim());
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Multiple categories (IN clause)
    if (
      categories &&
      typeof categories === "string" &&
      categories.trim().length > 0
    ) {
      const categoryList = categories
        .split(",")
        .map((c) => c.trim())
        .filter((c) => c.length > 0);
      if (categoryList.length > 0) {
        const placeholders = categoryList.map((_, i) => `$${paramIndex + i}`);
        conditions.push(`p.category IN (${placeholders.join(", ")})`);
        parameters.push(...categoryList);
        paramIndex += categoryList.length;
      }
    }

    // Multiple brands (IN clause)
    if (brands && typeof brands === "string" && brands.trim().length > 0) {
      const brandList = brands
        .split(",")
        .map((b) => b.trim())
        .filter((b) => b.length > 0);
      if (brandList.length > 0) {
        const placeholders = brandList.map((_, i) => `$${paramIndex + i}`);
        conditions.push(`p.brand IN (${placeholders.join(", ")})`);
        parameters.push(...brandList);
        paramIndex += brandList.length;
      }
    }

    // Price range: min_price
    if (min_price && !isNaN(Number(min_price))) {
      conditions.push(`p.price >= $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(Number(min_price));
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Price range: max_price
    if (max_price && !isNaN(Number(max_price))) {
      conditions.push(`p.price <= $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(Number(max_price));
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Price with custom operator
    if (
      price_operator &&
      typeof price_operator === "string" &&
      price_value &&
      !isNaN(Number(price_value))
    ) {
      const validOp = validateOperator(price_operator, ALLOWED_PRICE_OPERATORS);
      if (validOp) {
        conditions.push(`p.price ${validOp} $${paramIndex}`);
        parameters.push(Number(price_value));
        paramIndex++;
      } else {
        res.status(400).json({
          error: `Invalid price_operator. Allowed: ${Array.from(ALLOWED_PRICE_OPERATORS).join(", ")}`,
        });
        return;
      }
    }

    // Rating range: min_rating
    if (min_rating && !isNaN(Number(min_rating))) {
      conditions.push(`p.rating >= $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(Number(min_rating));
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Rating range: max_rating
    if (max_rating && !isNaN(Number(max_rating))) {
      conditions.push(`p.rating <= $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(Number(max_rating));
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Rating with custom operator
    if (
      rating_operator &&
      typeof rating_operator === "string" &&
      rating_value &&
      !isNaN(Number(rating_value))
    ) {
      const validOp = validateOperator(
        rating_operator,
        ALLOWED_RATING_OPERATORS
      );
      if (validOp) {
        conditions.push(`p.rating ${validOp} $${paramIndex}`);
        parameters.push(Number(rating_value));
        paramIndex++;
      } else {
        res.status(400).json({
          error: `Invalid rating_operator. Allowed: ${Array.from(ALLOWED_RATING_OPERATORS).join(", ")}`,
        });
        return;
      }
    }

    // Stock with custom operator
    if (
      stock_operator &&
      typeof stock_operator === "string" &&
      stock_value &&
      !isNaN(Number(stock_value))
    ) {
      const validOp = validateOperator(
        stock_operator,
        ALLOWED_STOCK_OPERATORS
      );
      if (validOp) {
        conditions.push(`p.stock ${validOp} $${paramIndex}`);
        parameters.push(Number(stock_value));
        paramIndex++;
      } else {
        res.status(400).json({
          error: `Invalid stock_operator. Allowed: ${Array.from(ALLOWED_STOCK_OPERATORS).join(", ")}`,
        });
        return;
      }
    }

    // Boolean: in_stock (stock > 0)
    if (in_stock !== undefined && typeof in_stock === "string") {
      const inStockBool = in_stock.toLowerCase() === "true";
      if (inStockBool) {
        conditions.push(`p.stock > 0`);
      } else {
        conditions.push(`p.stock = 0`);
      }
    }

    // Boolean: is_active
    if (is_active !== undefined && typeof is_active === "string") {
      conditions.push(`p.is_active = $${paramIndex}`);
      parameters.push(is_active.toLowerCase() === "true");
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Build WHERE clause
    const whereClause =
      conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

    // Sorting with allowlist validation
    let orderClause = "ORDER BY p.created_at DESC"; // default
    if (sort_by && typeof sort_by === "string") {
      const validColumn = validateSortColumn(sort_by);
      if (!validColumn) {
        res.status(400).json({
          error: `Invalid sort_by column. Allowed: ${Array.from(ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS).join(", ")}`,
        });
        return;
      }

      let validDirection = "ASC";
      if (sort_direction && typeof sort_direction === "string") {
        const dir = validateSortDirection(sort_direction);
        if (!dir) {
          res.status(400).json({
            error: `Invalid sort_direction. Allowed: ASC, DESC`,
          });
          return;
        }
        validDirection = dir;
      }

      orderClause = `ORDER BY p.${validColumn} ${validDirection}`;
    }

    // Pagination
    const pageNum = Math.max(1, parseInt(String(page || "1"), 10) || 1);
    const limitNum = Math.min(
      100,
      Math.max(1, parseInt(String(limit || "20"), 10) || 20)
    );
    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;

    // Build the final query
    const dataQuery = `
      SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.category, p.brand,
             p.stock, p.rating, p.is_active, p.created_at, p.updated_at
      FROM products p
      ${whereClause}
      ${orderClause}
      LIMIT $${paramIndex} OFFSET $${paramIndex + 1}
    `;

    const countQuery = `
      SELECT COUNT(*) as total
      FROM products p
      ${whereClause}
    `;

    const dataParams = [...parameters, limitNum, offset];
    const countParams = [...parameters];

    const productRepository = getRepository(Product);

    const [products, countResult] = await Promise.all([
      productRepository.query(dataQuery, dataParams),
      productRepository.query(countQuery, countParams),
    ]);

    const total = parseInt(countResult[0]?.total || "0", 10);
    const totalPages = Math.ceil(total / limitNum);

    res.json({
      data: products,
      pagination: {
        page: pageNum,
        limit: limitNum,
        total,
        total_pages: totalPages,
        has_next: pageNum < totalPages,
        has_previous: pageNum > 1,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Product search error:", error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal server error" });
  }
}

// Router setup
const router: Router = express.Router();
router.get("/api/products/search", searchProducts);

// App setup
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use(router);

// Database connection and server start
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

createConnection({
  type: "postgres",
  host: process.env.DB_HOST || "localhost",
  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || "5432", 10),
  username: process.env.DB_USERNAME || "postgres",
  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || "postgres",
  database: process.env.DB_NAME || "ecommerce",
  entities: [Product],
  synchronize: process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production",
  logging: process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production",
})
  .then(() => {
    console.log("Database connected successfully");
    app.listen(PORT, () => {
      console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
    });
  })
  .catch((error) => {
    console.error("Database connection error:", error);
    process.exit(1);
  });

export { app, router, searchProducts };
